name: nour/framework
description: A mini framework on top of OpenSwoole — HTTP routing, WebSocket dispatch, MySQL/Redis pools, config-driven webhooks, all behind a small DI container.

suggest.ext-openswoole: Required at runtime — install openswoole >= 22.x, OR install ext-swoole >= 5.0 (the framework targets the `Swoole\` namespace which both extensions provide)
suggest.ext-swoole: Alternative to ext-openswoole — install one of the two
suggest.ext-binary_json: The bundled native extension at src/extensions/php_binary_json/. Required by the Redis KeyValue / Queue structures for compact serialisation. Build with `phpize && ./configure && make install`.
